rationale: VRT Q1 2026 10-Q shows total net sales of $2,649.5M (vs. $2,036.0M in Q1 2025, +30% YoY) and capex of $112.6M in Q1 2026 vs. $36.5M in Q1 2025 (+208% YoY), strongly indicating accelerating investment in thermal/cooling capacity; deferred revenue surged to $2,461.8M from $1,814.7M at year-end, signaling robust demand pull-through for liquid cooling and related rack thermal products. Neither filing discloses explicit lead-time weeks, utilization %, pricing delta %, or node-mix data for the thermal-rack stage.
